/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -march=native -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libwfa2.so.0 -o libwfa2.so.0 CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_align.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_aligner.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_attributes.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_backtrace_buffer.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_bialigner.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_components.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_compute_affine2p.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_compute_affine.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_compute.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_compute_edit.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_compute_linear.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_debug.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_pcigar.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_penalties.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_plot.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_sequences.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_slab.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_unialign.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_termination.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_extend_kernels_avx.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/wavefront/wavefront_extend_kernels.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/system/mm_stack.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/system/mm_allocator.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/system/profiler_counter.c.o CMakeFiles/wfa2.dir/system/profiler_timer.c.o
